message:
refactor(mysql): hoist MAX_PACKET_SIZE to module-level constant and format numeric literals

Moved the MAX_PACKET_SIZE constant from inside read_packet() to module
scope so it can be referenced by other protocol functions that need the
16 MiB - 1 limit.

Also applied Rust numeric separator formatting to test literals:
197121 -> 197_121, 123456789012345 -> 123_456_789_012_345 for
readability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
